name: Asian Noodle Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 Large red peppers, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles according to package directions (cook for 4-6 minutes, or until tender); set aside.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat until it sizzles.
3. Add mushrooms, spinach, red peppers, zucchini, onions, and garlic; stir fry for 3-4 minutes.
4. Stir in soy sauce, chicken broth, and mix well.
5. Add noodles and gently toss to combine. Cook for approximately 1 minute until heated through.
6. Just before serving, pour the peanut sauce over top.
